summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Pet Life OS admin panel — major admin fixes including 7-tab PillarManager structure, Quick Add dropdown, Services modal, pagination, and multi-manager tab additions. All 18 test cases PASSED with 100% success rate.

test_results.go_manager_7_tabs: PASS — Tabs: Requests, Partners, Products, Services, Bundles, Tips, Settings
test_results.play_manager_7_tabs: PASS — Same PillarManager structure, all 7 tabs verified
test_results.go_requests_tab_live_tickets: PASS — Shows live service_desk tickets (TDB-2026-0872, TDB-2026-0735, etc.)
test_results.go_products_tab_pagination: PASS — ITEMS_PER_PAGE=20 confirmed in code; Page 1 of 37 shown in UI
test_results.go_services_tab_add_button: PASS — 'Add Service' button opens 'Add New Go Service' modal
test_results.quick_add_button_visible: PASS — Purple '+ Quick Add' button with data-testid='go-quick-add' visible in Go Manager header
test_results.quick_add_product: PASS — Switches to Products tab and opens 'Add Go Product' modal
test_results.quick_add_service: PASS — Switches to Services tab and opens create service modal
test_results.quick_add_bundle: PASS — Switches to Bundles tab and opens 'Add Go Bundle' modal; verified with data-testid='go-quick-add-bundle'
test_results.celebrate_manager_tips_tab: PASS — Tips tab present (verified via data-testid and tab listing)
test_results.emergency_manager_tips_tab: PASS — Tips tab present with data-testid='emergency-tab-tips'
test_results.farewell_manager_tips_tab: PASS — Tips tab present with data-testid='farewell-tab-tips'
test_results.learn_manager_partners_tips_tabs: PASS — Both Partners and Tips tabs present with data-testids
test_results.adopt_manager_4_tabs: PASS — Requests, Partners, Tips, Settings all present with data-testids
test_results.paperwork_manager_partners_tips: PASS — Both Partners and Tips tabs present with data-testids
test_results.soul_products_manager_no_jsx_error: PASS — Loads cleanly, no compilation errors, shows Soul Products with tabs
test_results.product_box_editor_status_in_pillar: PASS — 'Status in Pillar' section visible in ProductBoxEditor Pillars tab
test_results.product_box_editor_secondary_pillars: PASS — 'Secondary Pillars (Cross-pillar applicability)' grid visible in Pillars tab

critical_code_review_comments: Quick Add dropdown items use DropdownMenuItem (Radix UI) not <button>, so Playwright 'button:has-text()' selectors fail — testing must use data-testid='go-quick-add-bundle' pattern
PillarManager has data-testid for each Quick Add item: {pillar}-quick-add-product, {pillar}-quick-add-service, {pillar}-quick-add-bundle
All pillar managers in 12 PILLARS section have data-testid='admin-tab-{pillar}' for reliable navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 features verified and passing. Admin panel at /admin (credentials: aditya/lola4304). Navigate to Go Manager using data-testid='admin-tab-go' in 12 PILLARS section. Quick Add dropdown uses data-testid='{pillar}-quick-add' and sub-items use '{pillar}-quick-add-product/service/bundle'. ProductBoxEditor Pillars tab contains Status in Pillar and Secondary Pillars sections. SoulProductsManager JSX fix confirmed working. Pagination is 20 items/page via ITEMS_PER_PAGE=20 constant.
